title: DRG Pickaxes
description: A resource pack that adds some pickaxes from Deep Rock Galactic
body:
# Hello, miners!
I made a resource pack that adds some pickaxes from Deep Rock Galactic.

**REQUIRES CIT RESEWN TO WORK**

go to anvil with pickaxe and paste nametag from description without numbers or just download mod "rp renames" whatever

## how much pickaxes rp has:

1. Company Standard
2. Chasm-Borne Cliffhanger
3. Gadgeteer's Favorite
4. Core Hound
5. Arc Welder's Delight

And company standart skins: 
1. MegaCorp
2. Roughneck
3. Dawn of the Dread
4. The Supporter
5. Rival Tech
6. Robot Rebellion

(gonna add more pickaxes in future)
